resources.string:
"Don't be a T.O.O.L... Enlist with the GUN BROS today!
The Freakishly Rugged Advanced Genetics Galactic Enforcement Division (AKA F.R.A.G.G.E.D) specializes in the development and deployment of superhuman special agents. Headed since its formation by the brilliant soldier-turned-scientist Mother Gun, its current roster consists of only two active field operatives, code-named Percy and Francis Gun. Their lifelong mission: to protect the cosmos from the Tyrannical Oppressors of Life known as T.O.O.L.
Like a super-powered fungus gone haywire, the evil T.O.O.L organization has grown from the dankest levels of the criminal underworld to spread its own brand of malevolent funk to every corner of the galaxy. Most recently, they've set their sights on harvesting the rare element Xplodium in an effort to create even more powerful weapons to enslave the universe... But not if the GUN BROS have anything to do about it!"
File integrity check failed: Wrong size.
File integrity check failed: Checksum value %d is wrong.
You need the resource pack to play. The resource pack is %s. It is recommended that you use Wi-Fi to download. Would you like to download it to your internal memory or your SD card?
You need the resources to play. The resources total %s. It is recommended that you use Wi-Fi to download. Would you like to download it to your internal memory or your SD card?
Download failed -- wrong size on server. Please contact androidsupport@glu.com about this, and be sure to include where you downloaded %s from and the version: %s
Download failed. Could not connect to server.
Download failed. Lost connection with server. Please try again in an area with stronger signal or Wi-Fi coverage.
Download failed: Insufficient storage. %s bytes free required.
Download failed: Insufficient storage. %s bytes free required, %s bytes available.
Download failed: SD card not found.
Download failed: Could not save resource file. You may need to have as much as 35% more free space than the file requires to be able to save.
You may be able to resume your download. %s is the current target. Resume downloading?
Are you sure you want to start your download over?
Would you like to play the game, or delete the resource pack from your device? You will not lose your save data if you delete the resource pack, and you can always download it again.
"Delete resource pack? You will free %s but you won't be able to play until you download it again."
No merchants are available for this purchase.
Your purchase can be made through the following service:
Please choose your desired payment service:
You still have purchases pending. Please try again shortly.
Your purchase is ready. You may need to visit the city map to claim it.
Your last purchase did not go through. Your account has not been charged.
Resource file missing. Please put the appropriate SD card back in and try again or quit.
A computer is accessing your SD card, and %s cannot access the game resources. Please change your SD card connection options and try again.
Your SD card is currently being scanned by Android, and %s cannot access the game resources. Please try again shortly.

"You don't have an SD card in your device, but %s expects the game resources to be there. Please put your SD card back in before trying again, or start over and download the resources somewhere else."
You have changed your SD card, and %s cannot find the game resources. Please switch SD cards before trying again, or start over and download the resources somewhere else.
Your SD card is either not mounted or unreadable, and %s cannot find the game resources. Please correct the issue before trying again, or start over and download the resources somewhere else.
To ensure that your download uses a Wi-Fi network, go into Android Settings, then Wireless & networks. Turn on Airplane mode, followed by Wi-Fi, to exclusively use Wi-Fi.
NOTE: The only way to completely ensure that your download uses Wi-Fi is to remove your SIM card. Android OS 2.0 and higher allow you to turn on Wi-Fi when Airplane mode is on.
(NOTE: Your download will stop if you do this, but it can typically be resumed)

"We highly recommend that you use Wi-Fi to download the resources. Wi-Fi is typically faster, and doesn't use up your monthly data (if applicable). To use Wi-Fi, go into Android Settings, then Wireless networks, and then check the box by Wi-Fi. Select a familiar Wi-Fi network from the list below."
Tapping the advertisement will not interrupt your download.
Your resource pack download is complete. Switch over to start playing the game.
Your resource pack download failed. Please check your connection and try again.
"Would you like to download the media files for %s? (Formats: %s) There are %d total files. Download size is %s. These files are completely optional."
"Are you sure? If you downloaded to disk, you will not be asked again unless you delete the resource pack. If you downloaded to SD card, you will NEVER be able to download these resources."
Optional resources will also be deleted, freeing %s of storage.
Delete optional media? This will free %s.
Some files could not be deleted: %s
Could not delete optional media files, reason unknown: %s
No media to delete. However, you will be prompted to download optional media next time the game is launched.
Success. Next time you launch the game, you will be prompted to download optional media.

"%s automatically backs up some small game data files if you have a writable SD card inserted, and will restore them if you uninstall and reinstall the game. %s will only ever write to this location on your SD card: %s"
Your save files from a previous %s install, free version, or demo have been restored.

You refused to download AirMail Control Panel. We will not ask you to download it again, but you will not be able to receive %s news or special events. To enable AirMail notifications, choose \"Enable AirMail\" in the settings menu.
AirMail push notifications keep you informed about the latest news, events, and updates for %s. Would you like to enable AirMail push notifications?
Are you sure that you want to quit?
Could not post to Facebook wall. Please try again shortly.
Your previous save data has been compromised. It has been reset.
The integrity of this build could not be verified. To protect your game data, this app must close. Please contact androidsupport@glu.com with the following version: %s
"OpenFeintSettings.key cannot be null. Please specify your application's product key during construction."
"OpenFeintSettings.secret cannot be null. Please specify your application's product secret during construction."
OpenFeintSettings.id cannot be null. Please specify your application id during construction.
"OpenFeintSettings.name cannot be null. Please specify your application's name during construction."
iconUrl is null - make sure to load() this Achievement before calling downloadIcon.
"Can't unlock an achievement with a null resourceID."
"Can't load an achievement with a null resourceID."
profilePictureUrl is null - make sure to load() this User before calling downloadProfilePicture.
Your device may not have enough memory to complete this operation. Restarting may free up enough memory.
Sorry - there was a problem downloading this profile picture. Please try again.
Not enough room on your %1$s. Please free up some disk space and try again.
Score has no blob to download
Your profile picture has been changed.
"Feint couldn't initialize Would you like to send a crash report and wait for recovery?"
This user or application has been banned. All Feint functionality is disabled.
Feint requires an active network connection.
"Your request contains the string // - please check to make sure you didn't omit any resourceID."
